text.title: Cache Hit Audit Script Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project use Anthropic / OpenAI prompt caching?

conclusion.verdict: skip; methodology applies to projects using cache feature
defer; per-call savings too small to justify audit overhead — revisit at 1000/day

branch.question: Does the trace store capture cache_read_tokens?

conclusion.verdict: instrument trajectory-eval-otel first; cannot audit without the attributes
deploy daily audit; cluster by prefix_hash; alert on 20pp drops

text.example: cache_used=true → q-volume: 4K/day → q-attrs: present → prefix-clustering-by-hash; daily audit wired; 7-day baseline 84% ratio.
